2606.22317.title: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning Can Incentivize Reasoning Capacity in LLMs Beyond the Base Model
2606.22317.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is widely viewed as a promising path toward continuously improving large language models. Recent works, however, suggest that mainstream RLVR often reallocates sampling probabilities among trajectories already present in the base model: it can improve sampling efficiency, reflected by higher pass@1 scores, but yields limited gains, and can even decrease pass@k scores when k is large, and therefore may fail to expand the base model's reasoning capacity boundary. In this paper, we present a boundary-aware Curriculum RL approach to move beyond the base model's reasoning capacity boundary. Our approach first uses pass@k sampling to locate the current reasoning capacity boundary, then applies targeted teacher guidance to examples near or beyond that boundary, and finally uses RL to consolidate the newly introduced reasoning patterns. Across Qwen, Llama, and DeepSeek base models, boundary-aware Curriculum RL improves both pass@1 scores and pass@256 scores, with pass@1 reflecting one-attempt performance and pass@256 serving as an empirical proxy for the reasoning capacity boundary. In our experiments, average pass@256 improves by 9.8 percentage points over the base models and by 10.3 percentage points over Vanilla RLVR. These results suggest that boundary-aware Curriculum RL can provide a scalable route for LLMs to continuously improve beyond the base model's empirical reasoning capacity boundary.
2606.22317.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）被廣泛視為持續改進大型語言模型的有前景的途徑。<lb/>然而，最近的研究表明，主流的 RLVR 通常在基礎模型中重新分配已存在的軌跡的取樣概率：這可以提高取樣效率，反映在更高的 pass@1 分數上，但產生的增益有限，甚至在 k 值較大時可能會降低 pass@k 分數，因此可能無法擴展基礎模型的推理能力邊界。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種邊界感知的課程 RL 方法，以超越基礎模型的推理能力邊界。<lb/>我們的方法首先使用 pass@k 取樣來定位當前的推理能力邊界，然後對接近或超過該邊界的範例應用有針對性的教師指導，最後使用 RL 來鞏固新引入的推理模式。<lb/>在 Qwen、Llama 和 DeepSeek 基礎模型中，邊界感知的課程 RL 同時改善了 pass@1 分數和 pass@256 分數，其中 pass@1 反映了一次嘗試的表現，而 pass@256 作為推理能力邊界的實證代理。在我們的實驗中，平均 pass@256 相較於基礎模型提高了 9.8 個百分點，並且比 Vanilla RLVR 提高了 10.3 個百分點。<lb/>這些結果表明，邊界感知的課程 RL 可以為大型語言模型提供一條可擴展的路徑，以持續改進超越基礎模型的實證推理能力邊界。
2606.22317.author: Pengxiang Cai et.al.
2606.22317.authors: Pengxiang Cai, Tianchen Fang, Xiaohan Li, Qingyuan Zeng, Guocong Li, Jintai Chen
